components.text:
Hello,

You can consolidate your existing loans into a single personal loan.

Loan Details:
• Maximum Amount: {{1}}
• Interest Rate: {{2}}% per annum (reducing balance)
• Processing Fee: {{3}}
• Tenure: Up to {{4}} years

Disbursement:
• Amount will be credited to your registered account: {{5}}
• Processing time: {{6}} working days after approval

Required Documents:
1. Latest 3 months salary slip
2. Latest 3 months bank statement
3. PAN Card
4. Aadhaar Card
5. Address Proof

This is a promotional message. Loan approval is subject to verification and credit assessment.

To proceed, please reply below.

To opt-out, reply STOP.
T&C apply. Approval subject to verification.
